name: Chicago Construction Codes 2022
source_authority: City of Chicago Department of Buildings

rules.label: Chicago Egress / Stair Pressurization for High-Rise
rules.notes_template: Chicago amends IBC §909 / §403 with stair-pressurization, smoke-control, and elevator-recall provisions specific to local life-safety ordinances.
rules.citation: Chicago Construction Codes 2022 (based on IBC 2021) – Local high-rise life-safety amendments.
rules.remediation: Apply Chicago-specific high-rise provisions; coordinate with CDOB life-safety reviewer.
